description_long: This mobile phone features a striking deep red body with a matte finish, giving it a modern and bold appearance. The front display showcases a dramatic graphic of an astronaut helmet with a skull inside, set against a cosmic background with red geometric targeting lines and asteroids, creating a sci-fi aesthetic. The back of the phone is adorned with a prominent white skull emblem, reminiscent of the Punisher logo, positioned centrally below a square camera module. The camera module on the back contains four lenses and a flash, arranged in a square formation at the top left corner. The phone is slim, with slightly rounded edges and a flat profile, and no visible physical buttons on the sides. The overall design is visually impactful, blending futuristic and urban motifs with a high-contrast color palette.
description: A deep red mobile phone with a matte finish, featuring a dramatic astronaut skull graphic on the front and a white skull emblem on the back, with a quad-camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_0: Front view shows the display with a striking astronaut helmet and skull graphic, surrounded by red targeting lines and cosmic imagery.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the phone's slim profile and slightly rounded edges, with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displays a matte red surface with a white skull emblem centered below a square quad-camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and absence of visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A white skull emblem, reminiscent of the Punisher logo, is centered on the back below the camera module.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a graphic wallpaper featuring an astronaut helmet with a skull inside, red targeting lines, asteroids, and a lunar surface; no app icons or interface elements are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A square quad-camera module with four lenses and a flash is located at the top left corner on the back of the phone.
